Hurrah! Here they are. You excel yoursel: Well, anything to keep you warm.
…Nah, too easy.
Now let’s head out. This cave smells weird — and why’s it so steamy?
Ah, that was my favorite job. I useta craft those brooms special.
Still, works for me. I’d rather not be here come nightfall.
We’ve heard the legend. If you’re trying to spook us, don't bother.
Well, he bothered, and now I’m spooked. Can we hurry up?
Oh, man. All this racket… you’re gonna bring it back here.
“It”? You’re blaming all this on that story-book beast?
It’s not just a legend, y’know. It’s out there. And it’s angry.
Fantastic. So does Mallott make nice coffins?
Jeez, the heat offa this thing!
Whoever busted it, you can bet they wanted to keep things chilly.
So, certain owls don’t like the machines? Do you know their names?
Ha! No owl coulda wrecked it that bad. This guy had to be BIG.
…Got it! Here, I’ll just hitch the bag to my broom—
NO!!
That is, er, it’s really no trouble. I’ll guard the rations for us.
Gallant as always. We’ll let you lift the trees next time.
Bravo, my sweet Stella! Such grace, such poise!
Oh stop, that’s one of my lighter spells.
Just glad I could help.
Great, you got your toys back. Can we go now?

The machines are running good as new. I can’t wait to tell Mallott!
What was that?!
Probably just a strong breeze, right Volpe?
The cave… The marks in the snow… It’s the clawed beast!
Mallott’s machines must have woken it up!
Mallott!! Hang on, we’re coming!
We’re safe! But look — that monster ruined my workshop… again.
It’s your machines. They’ve been destroying the dragon’s habitat!
She’s no monster — she just wanted to nest in peace.
I see. So my owls were right about our new methods.
*Sigh* I was a fool to ignore them. They’re all the help I need.
We did it! Thanks for all your help, Vol—
Volpe? You there? Hey, you dropped your bag — and your…
Chloe’s ruby! That liar!!
Ouch. If only someone had warned you, huh?
As the workshop awaits, with its work all but ceased,
Heed the myth of the slumbering, many-clawed beast.
Isn’t this island just a bunch of exiles and an old guy’s workshop?
That “old guy” makes all our winter supplies. We need him!
Fine, but I’m keeping an eye out for that “many-clawed beast.”
Uh, sure Nero. Whatever keeps your tail down. Now, where’s Mallott?

And to stay on your toes… when the rogue next returns.
We shall meet again, Stella.
I… fear I can’t go on guiding you. I’m freezing in these clothes.
You mean your prison scrubs?
Oh no! Is there something I can do, Volpe?
My riding coat… it’s over in that cave. Let us hurry!

…Each?

Hark! I left my tool belt in a ditch up ahead.

That’s sweet of you, Volpe. I’ll get us there!
I regret choosing such a gloomy spot. I can’t see a thing in there.
Hey, can’t be picky when you’re smuggling street clothes.

Hardly says “Winter Wonderland”, does it? What an eyesore.

A savage sort! The damage is too much for me to fix.
Stella, I pray your bubble magic is enough to repair them.
I’ll make sure it is! We’ll go fix your gear… and find who did this.
The trees — they’ve collapsed! Curse this island’s harsh winds.
